hex cap screw.descriptionTemplate: {productName} is a {measurementSystemLabel} hex head fastener used for general fastening, repair, machinery, and construction applications. The external hex head is designed for installation with a wrench or socket, making it a practical choice where strong clamping force and easy serviceability are needed. {materialSentence} {threadSentence} {applicationSentence}

structural bolt.descriptionTemplate: {productName} is an A325 structural bolt intended for steel-to-steel structural connections. A325 is stored as the grade, while structural bolt is stored as the fastener type for builder filtering. {materialSentence} {originSentence} {applicationSentence}

socket head cap screw.descriptionTemplate: {productName} is a socket head cap screw with an internal hex drive for installations where a clean cylindrical head and high wrenching strength are useful. {materialSentence} {threadSentence} {applicationSentence}

button head cap screw.descriptionTemplate: {productName} is a button head cap screw with a low-profile rounded head and internal drive. It is commonly used where a finished appearance, lower head height, or reduced snag points are helpful. {materialSentence} {threadSentence} {applicationSentence}

flat head cap screw.descriptionTemplate: {productName} is a flat head cap screw designed to sit flush in a countersunk hole. It is commonly used where a smooth surface, flush fit, or clean finished assembly is needed. {materialSentence} {threadSentence} {applicationSentence}

heavy hex bolt.descriptionTemplate: {productName} is a standard heavy hex bolt used for general bolted assemblies where a larger bearing surface and heavy hex pattern are preferred. {materialSentence} {threadSentence} {applicationSentence}

flange bolt.descriptionTemplate: {productName} is a flange bolt with an integrated washer-style flange under the head to help distribute clamping load. {materialSentence} {threadSentence} {applicationSentence}

carriage bolt.descriptionTemplate: {productName} is a carriage bolt with a rounded head and square neck designed to resist turning once seated. {materialSentence} {threadSentence} {applicationSentence}
